title: Shift Requests
subtitle: Exchange or transfer published future shifts through employee and admin approval.

warningCodes.schedule_conflict: The employee has an overlapping published assignment.
warningCodes.approved_vacation: The employee has approved vacation on this day.

form.noShifts: No eligible future published shifts are available.
form.unlinked: Your account is not linked to an official schedule employee.

wizard.title: Shift Request Wizard
wizard.exchangeDesc: Exchange your published shift with a colleague's published shift
wizard.replaceDesc: Request a colleague to cover or replace your published shift
wizard.dateLabel: Select Date from Calendar or List
wizard.noShiftsInBranch: No available shifts in this branch for this employee.
wizard.noShiftsForType: No available shifts for this shift type.
wizard.reviewDesc: Verify dates, branches, and shift types before sending the request for approval.
wizard.noShiftsAvailableExchange: No future shifts available for exchange
wizard.selectedInAnotherTab: Selected shift: {shift} ({branch} · {type}). You are currently viewing a different tab.

validation.dayShiftOTConflictDesc: This Day Shift cannot be exchanged or replaced because the employee is assigned an Overtime (OT) schedule shift immediately after it.

messages.dayShiftOTConflict: This Day Shift cannot be exchanged or replaced because the employee is assigned an Overtime (OT) schedule shift immediately after it.
messages.duplicate: An active request for these shifts already exists.
messages.notPublished: The schedule for this month is not published or no longer available.
messages.notFound: The requested shift assignment could not be found.
messages.offeredRequired: An offered shift must be selected for exchange requests.
messages.invalidStatus: The current status of the request does not allow this operation.
messages.conflict: Review the warnings before confirming the override.
messages.storage: The operation could not be saved; no schedule change was kept.
messages.stale: The shift changed and this request is no longer valid.
messages.draftConflict: Resolve the conflicting draft cell before approving this request.
messages.rejectionNoteRequired: Enter the rejection reason when choosing Other.
messages.permission: You do not have permission to complete this request.
messages.generic: The request could not be completed.

actions.cancelled: Request cancelled successfully. No schedule changes were made.
actions.accepted: Request accepted and forwarded for admin approval.
actions.approved: Request approved and schedule updated immediately.
actions.overrideApproved: Request approved with conflict override and schedule updated.

statusNotices.cancelled: This request was cancelled by the requester. No changes were made to the published schedule.
statusNotices.recipient_rejected: This request was rejected by the recipient employee. No changes were made to the schedule.
statusNotices.admin_rejected: This request was rejected by the administrator. No changes were made to the schedule.
statusNotices.expired: This request expired before being completed.
statusNotices.stale: This request became invalid due to changes in the underlying shifts.
